subject: Add defaultbranch in .gitreview to ease the review for the branch and small patch to trigger the doc creation
commit_message:
Add defaultbranch in .gitreview to ease the review for the branch and
small patch to trigger the doc creation

Issue-ID: DOC-771
Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Iedf762fc91b176656b99fe9b10209bdc5dad1969
